professional_summary: The professional demonstrates a strong portfolio of eight projects, including three web APIs, three libraries, a CLI tool, and a full software system. They utilize Python, JavaScript, Go, and HTML across diverse system types.
skills_section:
Languages: Python, JavaScript, Go, HTML, CSS, Java, TypeScript
Frameworks & Libraries: Data Analysis, Data Validation, Express, FastAPI, Machine Learning, Numerical Computing, Testing
Practices: Technical Writing, Context Management, Resource Management, Command Line Tools, Advanced Collections, TypeScript Typing
developer_profile: The developer demonstrates expertise in building web APIs using Go and Python, with a strong portfolio spanning Go and JavaScript projects. They have experience in infrastructure automation through Terraform and advanced data processing with Python libraries.

projects.name: go-task-runner
projects.description: A CLI tool to run JSON-defined tasks with simple interval scheduling, designed for small homelab workflows.
bullets: Implemented a CLI-driven Go application to manage JSON-based task scheduling with interval execution.
Built a streamlined interface that simplifies repetitive task automation for small-scale homelabs.
Contributed to a robust system featuring dry-run testing, JSON result export, and modular architecture.
projects.narrative: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 120 lines across 7 files over 7 active days.

projects.name: personal-portfolio-site
projects.description: A lightweight static portfolio site highlighting projects, skills, and coursework.
bullets: Built a responsive static portfolio site using HTML and JavaScript to showcase projects and skills.
Designed a dynamic project grid with keyboard navigation and accessibility features for inclusive access.
Developed a hero section with a clear call-to-action and integrated an infrastructure project for real-world relevance.
Implemented SEO best practices and added a skills section to enhance discoverability and user engagement.
projects.narrative: Sole developer, adding 110 lines across 6 files over 21 active days.

projects.name: sensor-fleet-backend
projects.description: A web API service for ingesting IoT sensor readings with in-memory storage and health checks.
bullets: Built a robust FastAPI web API to ingest and store sensor readings in memory, enhancing real-time monitoring capabilities.
Implemented comprehensive health checks and uptime tracking to ensure system reliability and performance.
Designed and deployed 10 critical API endpoints, including ingestion, storage, and metric retrieval, supporting seamless data workflows.
projects.narrative: Contributed 43% of the codebase, adding 96 lines across 7 files over 10 active days.

projects.name: infra-terraform
projects.description: Terraform configuration for a small app stack, including VPC, subnets, and an app module with S3 logging bucket, designed for study/demo environments.
bullets: Implemented a Terraform-based infrastructure for a small app stack with VPC, subnets, and an S3 logging module.
Built modular configurations that streamline cloud setup and enhance scalability for developers.
Designed cost center tagging and output generation to improve visibility and automation in cloud operations.
projects.narrative: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 111 lines across 6 files over 7 active days.

projects.name: algorithms-toolkit
projects.description: A Python CLI tool for performing classic algorithms like BFS, DFS, and binary search on small datasets.
bullets: Built a Python CLI tool to implement classic algorithms including BFS, DFS, binary search, and Dijkstra's shortest path.
Designed and implemented a robust command-line interface using argparse for seamless algorithm testing.
Developed a load_graph function to efficiently parse and load graph data from files.
Added critical helper functions such as rotate, dijkstra, and two-sum to enhance usability and performance.
projects.narrative: Sole developer, adding 162 lines across 8 files over 18 active days.

projects.name: java-chat-service
projects.description: A tiny HTTP chat service using Java's built-in HttpServer to store and expose messages in memory.
bullets: Built a lightweight Java chat service using HttpServer to deliver real-time messaging capabilities
Implemented RESTful endpoints for health checks, message retrieval, and message sending with strict validation
Designed in-memory storage with synchronized lists to ensure thread safety and reliable message handling
projects.narrative: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 130 lines across 5 files over 7 active days.

projects.name: campus-navigation-api
projects.description: A TypeScript Express API for campus pathfinding and schedule-aware routing, providing endpoints for health, building listings, and shortest-path calculations.
bullets: Built a TypeScript Express API to deliver campus pathfinding and schedule-aware routing, enabling users to find optimal routes and building schedules.
Implemented a robust graph data structure to support efficient shortest-path calculations and dynamic preference routing.
Delivered 10 fully shipped endpoints, enhancing campus connectivity and providing actionable navigation insights.
projects.narrative: Contributed 36% of the codebase, adding 194 lines across 10 files over 9 active days.

projects.name: ml-lab-notebooks
projects.description: A library of machine learning experiments and utilities for data analysis and regression tasks.
bullets: Implemented a comprehensive library for machine learning experimentation and regression analysis.
Built robust data cleaning utilities and linear/logistic regression workflows to streamline model development.
Contributed to a scalable Python framework that enhances data preprocessing and evaluation efficiency.
projects.narrative: Contributed 32% of the codebase, adding 71 lines across 8 files over 7 active days.
